description: Expanded TRS verification library with IQ/OQ/PQ and CSV integrity tests derived from the example steam sterilizer package.

tests.title: Model and serial verification
tests.objective: Verify equipment model and serial number match approved purchase and asset records.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Nameplate details match approved records with no discrepancy.

tests.title: Steam and utility installation verification
tests.objective: Confirm steam, electrical, and utility connections are installed per specification.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: All utility hookups and baseline values meet approved installation criteria.

tests.title: Sensor calibration certificate verification
tests.objective: Verify current calibration certificates are available for temperature and pressure instrumentation.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: All required calibration certificates are current and traceable.

tests.title: Door interlock and emergency stop test
tests.objective: Verify interlocks and emergency stops function as designed.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Unsafe starts are prevented and emergency stop behavior meets specification.

tests.title: HMI version and account baseline
tests.objective: Capture software/firmware version and verify user roles/account setup baseline.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Version details and role setup are documented and approved.

tests.title: FAT/SAT and documentation package review
tests.objective: Verify FAT, SAT, manuals, and spares documentation are complete.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: All required supplier and site documentation is present and controlled.

tests.title: Bowie-Dick air removal test
tests.objective: Verify effective air removal for pre-vacuum cycles.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Bowie-Dick indicator shows uniform pass criteria with no nonconforming pattern.

tests.title: Chamber temperature uniformity mapping
tests.objective: Demonstrate chamber mapping performance over qualified load conditions.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: All mapped points remain within defined qualification tolerance limits.

tests.title: Vacuum and leak performance test
tests.objective: Verify vacuum drawdown and leak rate are within specification.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Leak and vacuum performance meet approved limits.

tests.title: Steam quality and condensate check
tests.objective: Confirm utility steam quality and condensate behavior support sterilization process consistency.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Steam quality attributes and condensate handling meet approved criteria.

tests.title: Sensor drift and redundancy test
tests.objective: Verify sensor stability and redundant measurement agreement during operation.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Sensor drift and differential are within defined tolerance across challenge runs.

tests.title: Control system and alarm verification
tests.objective: Challenge control logic, alarm handling, and interlock response in normal and fault conditions.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: All control actions and alarms respond according to specification and recovery logic.

tests.title: HMI export and printout integrity test
tests.objective: Verify required cycle data elements are present in export and report outputs.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Export and report outputs contain complete, legible, and matching release-relevant data.

tests.title: Exported cycle file integrity test
tests.objective: Verify exported cycle files are complete, parseable, and tamper-evident.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Required fields, record completeness, and file integrity checks pass.

tests.title: Printout versus export match test
tests.objective: Verify printed cycle records match exported files for key data points.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Critical fields and values between print and export are equivalent within expected formatting differences.

tests.title: Audit trail integrity test
tests.objective: Verify audit trail captures create/modify/delete and security-relevant actions.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Audit trail entries are complete, attributable, timestamped, and non-editable.

tests.title: Backup and restore verification
tests.objective: Verify backup and restore recover complete and uncorrupted release records.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Recovered data set matches original approved record set with traceable evidence.

tests.title: BI program verification
tests.objective: Verify BI workflow execution, handling, and incubation controls before PQ.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: BI process controls and records are complete and acceptable for PQ use.

tests.title: PQ biological indicator challenge runs
tests.objective: Demonstrate reproducible lethality/performance across representative production runs with BI challenge.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: All planned PQ runs meet acceptance criteria with acceptable BI outcomes and no critical deviations.

tests.title: Worst-case load profile challenge
tests.objective: Demonstrate consistent process performance using worst-case validated load and placement profile.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Worst-case cycles achieve all process and microbiological acceptance criteria.

tests.title: Routine throughput and consistency runs
tests.objective: Demonstrate process repeatability at planned throughput and normal operating cadence.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Success criteria met across all planned repeat runs with acceptable statistical consistency.

tests.title: PQ data package integrity verification
tests.objective: Verify all PQ cycle exports, BI logs, and reports are complete and traceable for final release package.
tests.acceptanceCriteria: PQ data package is complete, traceable, and signed per protocol requirements.
